offer: For medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month, frequent coding errors cause delayed reimbursements. We identify coding errors and reimbursement opportunities instead of manual coding review.
problem: frequent coding errors leading to delayed reimbursements
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflow solutions

try_it: Let users try error detection on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
